label: Live playback
description: Settings used by the Web UI to control live stream selection, resolution and quality.

streams.label: Friendly names and restream names to use for live view
streams.description: Mapping of configured stream names to restream/go2rtc names used for live playback.

height.label: Live camera view height
height.description: Height (pixels) to render the live stream in the Web UI; must be <= detect stream height.

quality.label: Live camera view quality
quality.description: Encoding quality for the live jsmpeg stream (1 highest, 31 lowest).
